description: 100% stacked bar chart showing each SBE region's 2025 mix of School Performance Grade bands — A or B (teal, on the baseline), C (grey), and D or F (rust) — with white separators between segments. In every region, C is the largest band.

title.text: School Performance Grade mix by region, 2025
title.subtitle: Share of schools in each grade band. Three ordered segments — A/B on the common baseline — with white separators where fills touch.

transform.calculate: indexof(['A or B', 'C', 'D or F'], datum.band)

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (School Performance Grades), 2025. Style-guide demo.
